---
name: 💡 Feature / improvement
about: Suggest a sharper persona, a better protocol rule, or a new debate pattern
title: "[Idea] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like to improve?

A clear description of the idea — e.g. a new persona, a mediation rule, a different output format, or a domain-specific variant.

## The problem it solves

What's awkward or missing today? When would this help?

## Proposed approach

How might it work? If it's a prompt/persona tweak, sketch the wording.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to address the same need, if any.

## Additional context

Examples, references to similar patterns, or anything else.
